# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

//Enable Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA)

//Enable Disposable Soft Synth Interface (dssi) (OSC also needed)

//Enable fluidsynth softsynth plugins.

//Enable Instrument Patch Library support (enhances soundfont support).

//Enable LASH Audio Session Handler (or LADISH compatibility layer)

//Enable LADSPA RDF (lrdf) Provides extra info for LADSPA plugins

//Enable LV2 debugging messages

//Enable LV2 user interface GTK2 support

//Enable MIDI Name support (MidNam). Official MMA instrument spec.

//Enable Lightweight Open Sound Control (liblo) (DSSI also recommended)

//Enable python control support.

se/src/synti/organ/organguibase.ui;/home/ad/doks/git/muse/src/synti/simpledrums2/simpledrums.cpp;/home/ad/doks/git/muse/src/synti/simpledrums2/simpledrumsgui.cpp;/home/ad/doks/git/muse/src/synti/simpledrums2/ssplugingui.cpp;/home/ad/doks/git/muse/src/synti/simpledrums2/simpledrumsguibase.ui;/home/ad/doks/git/muse/src/synti/vam/vam.cpp;/home/ad/doks/git/muse/src/synti/vam/vamgui.cpp;/home/ad/doks/git/muse/src/synti/vam/vamguibase.ui;/home/ad/doks/git/muse/src/synti/fluidsynth/fluidsynthgui.cpp;/home/ad/doks/git/muse/src/synti/fluidsynth/fluidsynti.cpp;/home/ad/doks/git/muse/src/synti/fluidsynth/fluidsynthguibase.ui;/home/ad/doks/git/muse/src/share/plugins/2142.ui
